findings.title: Permissionless time-locked emergency withdrawal lets any EOA drain ROAR and LP reserves

best_agent_match.title: Unrestricted emergency withdrawal lets any EOA drain both token balances

findings.title: Hard-coded withdrawal amounts can permanently strand sub-threshold token balances

best_agent_match.title: Hard-coded payout amounts can permanently lock residual funds or strand surpluses

rejected_candidates.title: The arithmetic guard is a disguised hardcoded unlock that always passes after a preset date
rejected_candidates.reason: This is the mechanism that makes F-001 exploitable, but it does not create distinct protocol harm beyond the permissionless drain already captured there.

rejected_candidates.title: Using tx.origin as the beneficiary misroutes withdrawals and enables phishing-style abuse
rejected_candidates.reason: `tx.origin` is poor practice, but here it does not add a separate exploitable loss beyond F-001 because the function is already permissionless and always pays the top-level caller.
